---
title: "Blog"
description: "Essays, notes, and technical writing."
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
---

Essays, notes, and technical writing on mathematics, machine learning, information geometry, and related topics.

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  document.querySelectorAll("#listing-listing .quarto-post").forEach((post) => {
    const description = post.querySelector(".listing-description");
    if (!description || description.dataset.expandReady === "true") {
      return;
    }

    description.dataset.expandReady = "true";

    const toggle = document.createElement("button");
    toggle.type = "button";
    toggle.className = "listing-description-toggle";
    toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", "false");
    toggle.textContent = "Read more";

    toggle.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();

      const expanded = post.classList.toggle("description-expanded");
      toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", String(expanded));
      toggle.textContent = expanded ? "Show less" : "Read more";
    });

    description.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", toggle);
  });
});
</script>
